text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup, and the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has managed to win all three.
What comes after is a shower of gifts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew! That makes the last of them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for taking up so much space in your
office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I'm very thankful for everyone's
generosity.
choice_data_list:
Congrats again on winning the Senior Autumn
Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It was only with your help that I found success in
the Twin Tenno Sho, a first for the Mejiro family,
as well as the Senior Autumn Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
For all of this, I am extremely grateful. Thank you
very—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock
Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I'm sorry. Were you in the middle of
something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Satono. No, you aren't interrupting anything.
What can we do for you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I came to congratulate the two of you.
Congratulations on your Senior Autumn Triple
Crown!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah... That's very thoughtful of you. Thank you for
going out of your way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But we've already received your celebratory gift,
Satono.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It was the largest package to come—a golden
claw machine filled with plushies of myself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No, that alone isn't enough! That's why I came to
speak with you directly.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're truly amazing, McQueen. I was reminded
of this when I saw you race the other day.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You've become an even more dazzling role model
for the rest of us. I've never been happier.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I will put all my efforts into pursuing the kind of
radiance you have.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. That just didn't sound like much of
a congratulatory thing to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You seemed to be declaring your intentions to
surpass me one day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's all right though, don't worry. I accept
your competitive spirit as the greatest
congratulations I could receive.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to competing with you. The
challenge you bring will push me to even greater
heights.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay. I know I'll get there someday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has accomplished a lot, but she
won't stop there. Her heart races in anticipation
of gaining a new rival.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: By the way, are you enjoying the claw game?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Since you knew what was inside the box, I
assumed you'd played it already.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I certainly intend to capture all of the plushies
one of these days!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has become Senior Autumn
Triple Crown champion. What she will accomplish
next is anyone's guess!
